info.title: TOMA API
info.description: Training management system API. Contract generated from @toma/shared zod schemas.

get.summary: Current authenticated user and resolved role
List employees (server-side paginated & filtered)
Employee profile (fields masked per role)
Full multi-year training history grouped by series (requirement #4)
List course runs

post.summary: Create a course (HR); a manager create is forced to status=requested

get.summary: Course detail
Sessions of a course
Registration roster for the caller's scope: seat availability + eligibility per person (req. #7/#8/#9)
Seat accounting for a course (total & remaining seats; null = unlimited)

post.summary: Register an employee; response surfaces prior participations & conflicts (req. #4)

get.summary: Bulk duplicate/conflict precheck before committing registrations

patch.summary: Approve / decline / cancel a person's registration on a course (requirement #7)

put.summary: Mark or unmark attendance for an employee at a session

get.summary: List HR-configured notification rules
Education-hours rollup (server-computed)
Mandatory-training compliance. scope=team (full org subtree) or organization (HR/admin)
Yearly training budget vs committed spend (HR/admin only)
Attendance rollup — did registered people attend? scope=team (org subtree) or organization (HR)
Development view: non-mandatory attendance + per-discipline goal attainment + per-person roster. scope=team (org subtree) or organization (HR)
The signed-in user's personal training summary (hours + required courses + goals)
Per-discipline yearly training-hour goals (readable by any authenticated user)
A cycle's bidding/registration board, scoped to the caller (manager bids / HR review)

post.summary: HR opens bidding on candidate courses with a deadline; managers are mailed (req. #1)
HR opens registration for chosen courses with a lock deadline; managers mailed (#2)
Lock registration for a cycle — only HR can change registrations afterwards (#4)
Set a manager's bid (seats wanted) on a candidate course (requirement #1)

get.summary: All managers’ bids on a candidate course (HR review, requirement #2)

post.summary: HR confirms or cancels a course by participant numbers; participants mailed (#6/#7/#8)

get.summary: The signed-in user’s notification inbox (outbox stand-in for Exchange mail)

post.summary: Dispatch due notifications (simulates the scheduled Exchange send) — HR/admin/dev

get.summary: The per-day attendance grid HR fills in at the end of each course day (requirement #9)

put.summary: HR marks one person present/absent for one day; an absence opens a justification (#9)

get.summary: No-show justifications visible to the caller (HR: all; manager: team; employee: own)

post.summary: Submit a reason for a no-show (employee or their manager)
HR accepts or rejects a submitted justification
